title: Pre-Registered N-of-1 Longitudinal Evaluation of Agent-Memory Frameworks on a Coding-CLI Substrate

spend_tracking.note: All backends used local embeddings; Anthropic Haiku in smoke was placeholder (no actual API calls). Spend ledger unchanged from pre-build baseline.

next_action_on_resume: Phase 2 deployment kickoff. Steps: (a) install Claude Code skill into ~/.claude/skills/roomd-memory-retrieval/; (b) start local Letta server in docker; (c) run `make preregister`, git commit, optionally push to a public repo or OSF (the commit hash is the priority timestamp); (d) Vector begins ~4-6 weeks of daily roomd work under ROOMD_MEM_ARM env var randomization; (e) periodically run `make eval_corpus` to update results JSONL; (f) at N=120+ sessions, run final stats + Paper v1.0 build.
phase2_prerequisites: git init in distillation/phd/ (or use the existing repo) and commit preregistration/v1.md
Letta server running (docker run -p 8283:8283 letta/letta:latest) for full coverage of Letta arm
OPENAI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY exported for Cognee's cognify path
phd_mem CLI for task recording (TBD: small thin wrapper around metrics.compute_session_metrics)
